description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white facade. The structure consists of two main volumes: a larger single-story section and a smaller, slightly elevated block with vertical slit windows. The front of the bungalow includes a patio area with steps leading up to the entrance, surrounded by a low wall and a neatly manicured lawn. Large glass doors and windows dominate the front, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor space. The property is enclosed by a rectangular boundary wall, providing privacy and a defined perimeter. Sparse landscaping, including a few shrubs, adds a touch of greenery to the otherwise geometric and open layout.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with large glass windows, a front patio, and a minimalist lawn enclosed by a boundary wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio steps, large glass doors, and the expansive lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lawn and the solid, windowless side of the elevated block.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with vertical slit windows and the enclosed green space.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the patio, some landscaping, and the relationship between the two building volumes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
